creator: office@pc-service.ch
text:
In /var/log/messages I get since a long time such messages:

Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: u
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: u
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: 1
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: i
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: .
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: :
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: 4
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: 80
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: 0
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel:
Oct 27 05:45:10 firewall kernel: u

It occurs only in conjunction with ipfw. 

Periodically there are some thread about in in freebsd-stable@ like these:

http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=119092+0+archive/2010/freebsd-questions/20100919.freebsd-questions

Fix: 

Do not use ipfw.
How-To-Repeat: Use ipfw as firewall.
